Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

could you explain why it is not marked as resend if has already been sent once? it is to be unregistered in this case only, i.e. it seems the bug is to set rq_resend where needed.

Patch Set 2:

the request could be replayed after the call "after_reply" in ptlrpc_check_set,, then it could be some kind of
resending the request

Patch Set 2:

I see. in this case ptlrpc_replay_req() resets the state to NEW and it is send through ptlrpc_send_new_req

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

parents.subject: LU-7558 ptlrpc: connect vs import invalidate race

commit.subject: LU-11647 ptlrpc: always unregister bulk
commit.message:
LU-11647 ptlrpc: always unregister bulk

In ptlrpc_check_set, the bulk should be unregistered before
ptl_send_rpc in any case.

Change-Id: Icf963002f934b43ccbb9d6ef02ba7f9d11f297f8
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/22378
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
